observedDualDecor.message: A class can not be decorated by '@Observed' and '@ObservedV2' at the same time.

observedInheritConflict.message: A class decorated by '@Observed' cannot inherit from a class decorated by '@ObservedV2'.

observedV2InheritV1.message: A class decorated by '@ObservedV2' cannot inherit from a class decorated by '@Observed'.

traceOutsideObservedV2.message: The '@Trace' can decorate only member 'variables' within a 'class' decorated with '@ObservedV2'.

traceOnMethod.message: The '@Trace' can decorate only member 'variables' within a 'class' decorated with '@ObservedV2'.

paramInObservedV2.message: The '@Param' decorator can only be used with 'struct'.

localInObservedV2.message: The '@Local' decorator can only be used with 'struct'.

sendableWithTrace.message: The '@Trace' can decorate only member 'variables' within a 'class' decorated with '@ObservedV2'.
